title: Delicate Poached American Chicken Skillet
description: A savory and silky weeknight American dish featuring poached chicken, blueberries, and a hint of spice, cooked to perfection in a copper mug.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large copper mug over medium heat.
Add the chicken to the mug and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chicken broth, salt, black pepper, garlic powder, and dried thyme to the mug.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the fresh blueberries to the mug and stir gently to combine.
Poach the chicken in the simmering broth for an additional 5 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the mug from the heat and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the chicken and blueberries hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
